programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: A kung-fu expert (Donnie Yen) searches for a vicious serial killer who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: Gundala: Rise of a Hero
programme.desc: Surrounded by injustice, a streetwise man faces a crossroads.

programme.title: Hunt The Wicked
programme.desc: As chaos erupts, detective Huang must expose a city's dark truth while outsmarting Wei.

programme.title: Bad City
programme.desc: In poverty-stricken Kaiko City, a corrupt mayoral candidate eliminates rival mafias.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three middle-aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three middle-aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

programme.title: Police Story 2013
programme.desc: A police captain must spring into action when a kidnapping plan unravels at a nightclub.

programme.title: A Legend
programme.desc: An archaeologist dreams of a jade pendant and finds similar relics in a glacier.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After his sworn brother betrays him, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After his sworn brother betrays him, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple.

programme.title: The Knights of the Shadow
programme.desc: A legendary demon hunter (Jackie Chan), tracks down beasts that enter the human dimension.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: Freedom fighters must battle an entire army after they ambush a heavily armed military train.

programme.desc: A police captain must spring into action when a kidnapping plan unravels at a nightclub.

programme.desc: Freedom fighters must battle an entire army after they ambush a heavily armed military train.

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: A fearless martial-arts master seeks revenge for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: A man loses his memory and wakes up in a new body every 12 hours, forced to discover his identity.

programme.title: Hansan: Rising Dragon
programme.desc: In 1592, with Korea in danger of falling to the Japanese navy, it resorts to a secret weapon.

programme.title: Rise of the Legend
programme.desc: A martial arts master returns to the town where his father was murdered to take on a crime boss.
